evaluators.name: Most Powerful 3-Axis Mill Under 60k Added to Cart
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart contains quantity 1 of the most powerful qualifying 3-axis CNC milling machine under $60,000 with table size at least 800x400 mm.

evaluators.name: Entry-Level CNC Mill Configured and Quote Submitted
evaluators.description: Checks that an entry-level CNC mill was configured with ≥7.5 kW spindle, ATC, some coolant, total price ≤ $45,000, and that a quote request with contact details was submitted.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Compatible ProMill 500 Main Spindle Added Twice
evaluators.description: Checks that the cheapest in-stock main spindle compatible with a 2022 ProMill 500 was added to the cart with quantity two.

evaluators.name: Earliest Online Beginner CNC Course Registration
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered for the earliest online beginner/introductory CNC course starting after September 1, 2024, with one participant and contact details provided.

evaluators.name: Nearest Authorized Service Dealer Messaged
evaluators.description: Checks that the user contacted the nearest authorized service dealer within 100 km of ZIP code 60601 via the dealer contact form.

evaluators.name: VMC 850 English Manual and Safety Instructions Downloaded
evaluators.description: Uses instrumentation flags to check that both the English user manual and English safety instructions for VMC 850 were downloaded.

evaluators.name: Newest Aerospace Titanium 5-Axis Case Study Favorited and Link Copied
evaluators.description: Checks that the newest aerospace titanium 5-axis machining case study was added to favorites and its link was copied via the interface.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Maintenance Plan Subscribed with Early October Start
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed to the cheapest maintenance plan under $200/month that includes an annual on-site inspection, with a preferred start date in early October 2024 and contact details submitted.
